summary: Completed testing of Customer UX Go-Live Fix Pack (4 passes). Backend: 15/15 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 4 customer UX passes verified - BankTransferPage payer name validation, QuotesPageV2 table-first design, InvoicesPageV2 with rejection reason column, OrdersPageV2 with detail drawer.
critical_code_review_comments: BankTransferPage correctly positions 'Name on Bank Transfer' field above proof upload area
Submit button properly disabled when payer name is empty OR proof not uploaded
QuotesPageV2 has all required columns: Quote #, Date, Valid Until, Type, Amount, Status, Payment, Actions
InvoicesPageV2 includes Rejection Reason column and unpaid total alert banner
OrdersPageV2 detail drawer shows items, totals (Subtotal/VAT/Total), delivery info, and status banner
All pages have proper data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Customer UX Go-Live Fix Pack fully tested. Pass 1: BankTransferPage has payer name field above proof upload with validation (disabled submit until both filled). Pass 2: QuotesPageV2 is table-first with columns (Quote #, Date, Valid Until, Type, Amount, Status, Payment, Actions), search/filter, expired quotes retained. Pass 3: InvoicesPageV2 has rejection reason column, resubmit proof link for rejected, under_review status, unpaid total alert. Pass 4: OrdersPageV2 has responsive table with detail drawer showing items/totals/delivery/status. Admin finance queue accessible at /admin > Finance > Payments Queue.

backend: POST /api/live-commerce/finance/proofs/{id}/approve creates order when fully paid ✓
frontend: Customer login at /login with demo.customer@konekt.com / Demo123! ✓
BankTransferPage at /payment/bank-transfer has 'Name on Bank Transfer' field above proof upload ✓
BankTransferPage submit button disabled when payer name is empty ✓
BankTransferPage shows inline error message when validation fails ✓
QuotesPageV2 at /dashboard/quotes shows table with columns: Quote #, Date, Valid Until, Type, Amount, Status, Payment, Actions ✓
QuotesPageV2 has search and status filter inputs ✓
QuotesPageV2 shows 'Request a Quote' link in empty state ✓
InvoicesPageV2 at /dashboard/invoices shows table with columns: Invoice #, Source, Type, Amount, Payment Status, Rejection Reason, Actions ✓
InvoicesPageV2 shows unpaid total alert banner (TZS 440,000 in unpaid invoices) ✓
InvoicesPageV2 has search and status filter ✓
InvoicesPageV2 empty state has 'Continue Shopping' link ✓
OrdersPageV2 at /dashboard/orders shows table with: Order #, Date, Items, Total, Status, Payment, chevron ✓
OrdersPageV2 clicking a row opens detail drawer with items, totals, delivery, status banner ✓
OrdersPageV2 detail drawer has close button ✓
OrdersPageV2 empty state has 'Browse Marketplace' link ✓
Admin can navigate to Finance > Payments Queue ✓

pass_1_bank_transfer.payer_name_field: Above proof upload with label 'Name on Bank Transfer'
pass_1_bank_transfer.validation: Inline error shown when empty, submit disabled until both payer name + proof filled

pass_2_quotes.features: Search, status filter, expired quotes retained as history

pass_3_invoices.features: Unpaid total alert, search, status filter, resubmit proof link for rejected
pass_3_invoices.action_labels: View, Pay Now, Resubmit Proof, View Order

pass_4_orders.features: Click row to open drawer, close button, responsive design
